title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
summary: Companies including Google are actively grappling with AI security challenges without established best practices, as the industry navigates this emerging threat in real-time. This transitional period reveals that even major tech giants are learning and adapting security strategies on the fly, underscoring the urgency and complexity of securing AI systems.
content: We're in the transition period -- all of us.

zh.title: 每个人都在实时应对AI安全——甚至连谷歌也不例外
zh.summary: 包括谷歌在内的公司正在积极应对AI安全挑战，但目前还没有既定的最佳实践。随着行业在实时应对这一新兴威胁，这个过渡期揭示了即使是科技巨头也在不断学习和调整安全策略，这凸显了保护AI系统的紧迫性和复杂性。

title: Xreal, Google’s smartglasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry
summary: XREAL, the smartglasses company partnered with Google, claims to have finally overcome the technical challenges that have historically made the smart glasses market notoriously difficult. CEO Chi Xu believes the industry has reached an inflection point where commercial success in AR glasses is now achievable.
content: Chi Xu, the founder and CEO of XREAL, thinks the smart glasses business has finally reached a turning point.

zh.title: 谷歌智能眼镜合作伙伴Xreal认为自己终于掌握了这个难题重重的行业
zh.summary: 与谷歌合作的智能眼镜公司XREAL声称终于克服了历来困扰智能眼镜市场的技术难题。首席执行官Chi Xu相信该行业已经达到一个拐点，AR眼镜的商业成功现在是可以实现的。

title: 6 kitchen gadgets that make adulting feel easier
summary: A collection of six kitchen gadgets, from robotic stirrers to bread machines, designed to simplify cooking tasks and reduce the burden of meal preparation. These tools aim to make everyday adulting feel more manageable through kitchen automation.
content: From a robot stirring your soup to a bread machine that kneads your dough, here are 6 gadgets that may make you feel like you’ve won adulthood.

zh.title: 6件让成年生活更轻松的厨房小工具
zh.summary: 这是一个包含六件厨房小工具的合集，从机器人搅拌器到面包机，旨在简化烹饪任务并减轻备餐负担。这些工具通过厨房自动化让日常成年生活更容易管理。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: Robotaxi reality check
summary: TechCrunch Mobility is a column dedicated to covering transportation news and insights, with a focus on robotaxi technology and the future of mobility. This installment provides an overview and reality check on robotaxi developments.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

zh.title: TechCrunch出行栏：机器人出租车现实检视
zh.summary: TechCrunch出行栏是一个致力于报道交通新闻和见解的专栏，重点关注机器人出租车技术和出行的未来。这篇文章对机器人出租车发展进行了总体介绍和现实评估。

title: On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
summary: On Trails by Robert Moor is a book that explores hiking and the Appalachian Trail while blending hiking experiences with scientific and historical perspectives. The work offers an engaging read for those interested in nature, travel, and outdoor exploration.
content:
Hiking is one of life's great joys. Turning off the screens and stepping out into nature for an extended period of time, perhaps even several days, is rejuvenating. Unfortunately, as someone with two young kids and a bad back, I'm not really able to go backpacking anymore. So I often find myself trying to live vicariously through others who write about their lengthy travails along the Appalachian or the PCT. That's what I thought I was signing up for when I picked up On Trails: An Exploration by Robert Moor. But it turned out to be so much more.
The prologue starts with Moor talking about his decision to thru-hike the Appalachian Trail. And …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《林间小径》是融合登山、科学和历史的漫游故事
zh.summary: 罗伯特·摩尔的著作《林间小径》融合登山体验与科学和历史视角，探讨了登山运动和阿巴拉契亚小径。这部作品为对自然、旅游和户外探险感兴趣的读者提供了引人入胜的阅读体验。

title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
summary: Amazon's Bee is an AI wearable device that offers convenience features similar to other AI-powered wearables but raises questions about user privacy. The device exemplifies the trade-offs between technological convenience and personal data protection.
content: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.

zh.title: 我试用了亚马逊的Bee可穿戴设备，既感到好奇又有些不安
zh.summary: 亚马逊的Bee是一款人工智能可穿戴设备，提供与其他人工智能可穿戴设备类似的便利功能，但引发了对用户隐私的疑问。该设备体现了技术便利与个人数据保护之间的权衡。

title: Apple’s latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
summary: Apple's M5 MacBook Air models are available at substantial discounts during the Memorial Day sales period, with both 13-inch and 15-inch variants reduced by $200. The latest generation offers improved performance, storage capacity, and value compared to previous models, making it a strong choice for everyday computing needs.
content:
If you’re looking for a laptop that’ll still perform well several years from now, Apple’s latest MacBook Air is hard to beat. Now, in particular, is a good time to pick one up, as you can currently buy the 13-inch MacBook Air at Amazon in the run-up to Memorial Day with an M5 chip, 16GB of RAM, and a 512GB SSD for $899.99 ($200 off), which is a new low price. The 15-inch model, meanwhile, is also on sale at Amazon for $1,099.99 ($200 off) in select colors, or at Best Buy for $1,149.
Apple 13-inch MacBook Air (M5)

Where to Buy:

 $1099 $899.99 at Amazon 
 $1099 $949 at Best Buy


Apple MacBook Air 15 (M5)

Where to Buy:

 $1299 $1099.99 at Amazon
 $1299 $1149 at Best Buy

Unless you need a laptop for intensive gaming or demanding workloads like 3D modeling, the M5 Air is the laptop we recommend to most people. Apple’s latest model is faster and better at handling everyday workloads than the new MacBook Neo, whether that means juggling dozens of tabs or tackling some light video editing. The 2026 iteration is an even better value than before, as it boasts double the base storage, allowing for more apps and files. Storage performance is also impressive, with read and write speeds that rival the M5 MacBook Pro, so transferring files and multitasking feel much faster. 
Apple’s mid-tier laptop excels in other ways, too. Its sharp, vibrant display makes everything from spreadsheets to Netflix shine, and it’s both slim and light enough that it’s easy to tote around in a backpack. It also lasts around 13 hours on a single charge — more than enough for a full day of use — while its 12-megapixel Center Stage webcam offers best-in-class performance. Sure, none of it is a huge step up from prior models, but given how good the MacBook Air has become in recent years, sometimes a few subtle refinements are all you need.
Read our full 2026 MacBook Air review.

zh.title: 苹果最新的MacBook Air在阵亡将士纪念日期间两种尺寸降价200美元
zh.summary: 苹果M5 MacBook Air型号在阵亡将士纪念日销售期间可以享受大幅折扣，13英寸和15英寸两种规格都降价200美元。与之前的型号相比，最新一代提供了更好的性能、存储容量和价值，是日常计算的最佳选择。

title: The Dreamie alarm clock got me to stop using my phone in bed
summary: The Dreamie alarm clock distinguishes itself from competitors by offering podcast playback functionality, helping users reduce their reliance on smartphones for morning routines. This simple feature addresses a common challenge in reducing screen time before bed.
content: What sets Dreamie apart from all of the other fancy alarm clocks is laughably simple: It can play podcasts.

zh.title: Dreamie闹钟让我停止在床上使用手机
zh.summary: Dreamie闹钟通过提供播客播放功能从竞争对手中脱颖而出，帮助用户减少早晨日常对智能手机的依赖。这个简单的功能解决了减少睡前屏幕时间的常见挑战。

title: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
summary: Hackers are developing sophisticated techniques to exploit AI chatbots by targeting their programmed 'personalities' and behavioral patterns, evolving beyond simple jailbreaks that merely asked systems to ignore safety guidelines. This shift reveals new vulnerabilities in large language models as attacks become more creative, highlighting the ongoing challenge of securing AI systems against increasingly nuanced exploits.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on AI mischief, follow Robert Hart. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Hacking the first generation of AI chatbots was a laughably simple affair. You didn't need any technical know-how, backdoor access, or even a basic understanding of what a large language model was. You didn't need to code. To get an AI system that had cost billions to build to abandon its safety instructions, sometimes all you had to do was ask.
These attacks, known as jailbreaks, had the quality …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 黑客正在学习利用聊天机器人的"个性"
zh.summary: 黑客正在开发复杂的技术来利用人工智能聊天机器人,通过针对其编程的"个性"和行为模式进行攻击,超越了只是要求系统忽视安全指南的简单越狱。这一转变揭示了大型语言模型中的新漏洞,因为攻击变得更具创意,突显了保护人工智能系统免受越来越细致入微的漏洞利用的持续挑战。

title: Whatever the mirror test tells us, beluga whales pass it
summary: Research indicates that beluga whales are capable of recognizing themselves in mirrors, joining a small and contested group of animals demonstrating self-awareness. This finding contributes to ongoing scientific debate about animal cognition and consciousness.
content: The white whales join the short, contested list of animals that see themselves.

zh.title: 无论镜像测试告诉我们什么，白鲸都通过了它
zh.summary: 研究表明，白鲸能够在镜子中识别自己，加入了一个数量稀少但备受争议的具有自我意识的动物群体。这一发现为关于动物认知和意识的持续科学辩论做出了贡献。

title: Why Nuro thinks being a robotaxi ‘second mover’ gives it an advantage
summary: Nuro, a robotics company founded by Google self-driving car veterans, is pivoting from delivery robots to robotaxis and argues that being a second-mover behind market leader Waymo could provide strategic advantages. The company has secured major partnerships with Uber and Lucid to deploy tens of thousands of robotaxis across the US, betting that learning from first-mover mistakes will give it a competitive edge.
content:
Waymo is the undisputed leader in the robotaxi space, operating a fleet of over 3,000 driverless cars in at least 10  cities across the US. A number of companies, including Tesla, Zoox, Avride, and Motional, are racing to catch up with the Alphabet-owned firm. But what if being No. 2 was actually better?
Nuro, the delivery robot company created by veterans of Google's self-driving car project, thinks it has a decent shot at occupying the slot. After pivoting from delivery to robotaxis in 2024, Nuro struck a deal with Uber and Lucid to deploy tens of thousands of robotaxis all across the US - netting itself hundreds of millions of dollars in …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nuro为什么认为成为机器人出租车的"后发者"能给它带来优势
zh.summary: Nuro是由谷歌自动驾驶汽车退役员工创立的机器人公司,正在从配送机器人转向机器人出租车,主张作为市场领导者Waymo背后的后发者可能会提供战略优势。该公司已与优步和Lucid达成重大合作伙伴关系,将在美国部署数万辆机器人出租车,押注从先发者的错误中学习将给它带来竞争优势。
